docs.title: Separation of Duties Matrix
docs.duties_matrix: A role-to-duty matrix maps each sensitive function to distinct roles: change authoring vs. change approval, deployment to production vs. IAM policy administration, audit-log administration vs. audit-log review, and access-request approval vs. access-request fulfilment. No single role holds both sides of any pair.
docs.conflicting_roles_identified: Developer + production-deployer, security-log-administrator + security-log-reviewer, and access-approver + access-fulfiller are documented as mutually exclusive and enforced through distinct Okta groups.
docs.review_process: The matrix is reviewed quarterly by the security team and re-approved annually by the control owner; conflicts surfaced by the quarterly access-review campaign are remediated within 30 days and tracked in the access-review workflow.
